plugins.name: WhisperKit
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by WhisperKit. 7 model sizes, 99 languages, streaming support.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 本地语音转文字，基于 WhisperKit。支持 7 种模型大小、99 种语言和流式识别。

plugins.name: Deepgram
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription via Deepgram API with real-time WebSocket streaming. Requires API key.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 Deepgram API 进行云端转录，支持实时 WebSocket 流式识别。需要 API 密钥。

plugins.name: Qwen3 ASR
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by MLX on Apple Silicon. 30 languages, no API key required.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 本地语音转文字，基于 Apple Silicon 上的 MLX。支持 30 种语言，无需 API 密钥。

plugins.name: Live Transcript
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: Show a floating live transcript window during recording.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 录音时显示悬浮实时转录窗口。

plugins.name: ElevenLabs
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription via ElevenLabs Scribe API with real-time WebSocket streaming.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 ElevenLabs Scribe API 进行云端转录，支持实时 WebSocket 流式识别。

plugins.name: GLM
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via Zhipu AI (GLM) API. Requires API key.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过智谱 AI (GLM) API 提供 LLM 服务，需要 API 密钥。

plugins.name: Kimi
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via Moonshot Kimi API. Requires API key.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 Moonshot Kimi API 提供 LLM 服务，需要 API 密钥。

plugins.name: MiniMax
plugins.author: DavyWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via MiniMax API. Requires API key.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 MiniMax API 提供 LLM 服务，需要 API 密钥。
